calendar.matters:
Mtn To Quash For Improper/Incomplete Service, Mtn To Quash For Improper/Incomplete Award Collection Attempts To Primary Deft And Failure To Collect From Bankruptcy Court
Off Calendar Jun-15-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Respondent LAURA VAN GALEN (Tel: 415-717-4466) in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: RESPONDENT LAURA VAN GALEN's 1. Motion To Quash For Improper/Incomplete Service; 2. Motion To Quash For Improper/Incomplete Award Collection Attempts To Primary Defendant; 3. Failure To Collect From Bankruptcy Court.

The Court notes it did not receive notification from any party of their intent to contest the Court's tentative ruling.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion ordered off calendar for lack of proof of service on plaintiff/petitioner Joe Della Santina.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Mtn To Quash For Improper/Incomplete Service, Mtn To Quash For Improper/Incomplete Award Collection Attempts To Primary Deft And Failure To Collect From Bankruptcy Court
Off Calendar May-30-2023 Continued To Jun-15-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (in-person):
Laura Van Galen, 415-608-6446 Respondent/moving party
No other Apperance.

RULING - Hearing is held. The Court inquires on the apparentt lack of service of notice of motion. Ms. Galen argues there is service on motion to quash, and shows her papers to the Court. The Court reviews the declaration and indicates this is the first time the Court is seeing the document. Ms. Galen states party has refused service on several occasions. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT LAURA VAN GALEN'S Motion To Quash For Improper/Incomplete Service, Motion To Quash For Improper/Incomplete Award Collection Attempts To Primary Defendant And Failure To Collect From Bankruptcy Court.

The matter is continued to June 15, 2023 at 9:30am. The clerk to notify the Mr. Santina of the continued hearing.***

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***see notes 5/30/23 from mgoodman, Mr. Santina notified by phone.***
